prompts.title: ### Professional Portfolio Reference Ima
prompts.content:
### Professional Portfolio Reference Image Analysis

1. MODEL CHARACTERISTICS:

* Age group: Strictly early 20s.
* Ethnicity/Nationality: East Asian.
* Facial mood: Serene, gentle, and softly captivating. The subject gazes directly into the camera with a calm, neutral expression, lips slightly parted, conveying a delicate and elegant vulnerability.
* Overall styling vibe: Youthful, ethereal, and romantic with a high-fashion editorial aesthetic.

2. SKIN & FACIAL DETAILS:

* Skin tone: Extremely fair, porcelain skin with cool, neutral undertones.
* Skin texture & quality: Ultra-smooth, luminous, and dewy with a flawless, satin-like radiance.
* Highlights & shadows on face: Soft highlights accentuate the bridge of the nose, the tops of the cheekbones, and the Cupid's bow. Gentle, diffused shadows contour the jawline and collarbones.
* Distinctive features: Large, expressive eyes and a highly symmetrical, delicate facial structure.
* Facial structure: Soft oval face shape with delicate, refined features and a slender neck.

3. MAKEUP DETAILS:

* Base/Foundation: Light-to-medium coverage with a dewy, glass-skin finish that enhances natural radiance.
* Eye makeup: Soft peach and neutral pink eyeshadow blended across the lids, subtle tight-lined dark brown eyeliner with a delicate outer wing, and finely defined, separated eyelashes.
* Brows: Softly filled, straight, and natural-looking light brown brows with a gentle arch.
* Cheeks: A delicate wash of pastel pink blush applied high on the cheekbones for a youthful, flushed look.
* Lips: A soft, gradient rose-pink lip color with a natural satin finish, concentrated at the center and diffused outward.
* Overall makeup style: Classic K-beauty "no-makeup" makeup style, emphasizing natural, youthful beauty.

4. CLOTHING & ACCESSORIES:

* Garment type: An off-the-shoulder corset-style top paired with matching detached arm sleeves.
* Color & shade variations: Creamy off-white and soft ivory.
* Fabric & texture: The main bodice and sleeves feature a highly textured, crinkled, and puckered elasticated fabric. The neckline is adorned with a delicate, layered, ruffled organza trim that has a sheer, translucent quality.
* Fit & cut: Form-fitting, strapless silhouette that highlights the shoulders and collarbones.
* Patterns or details: Ruffled, wavy edges on the sheer neckline trim.
* Accessories: A single, elegant white pearl stud earring on the visible earlobe and a delicate, thin gold ring on the left hand.
* Styling notes: The outfit creates a soft, romantic, and angelic aesthetic.

5. POSE & BODY LANGUAGE:

* Body position: Three-quarter angle facing slightly to the right, with the upper body leaning forward slightly.
* Head tilt: A subtle, elegant tilt to the left.
* Hand placement: The left hand is raised gracefully near the cheek with fingers softly curled, while the right hand rests gently across the chest, touching the opposite arm.
* Shoulder positioning: Relaxed, dropped shoulders that emphasize the collarbones and neckline.
* Overall pose mood: Graceful, poised, and delicate.

6. BACKGROUND & ENVIRONMENT:

* Setting type: Minimalist studio setting.
* Color palette of background: Solid, clean, light gray-blue backdrop.
* Depth of field: Shallow depth of field, keeping the subject in sharp focus while the background is completely smooth and uniform.
* Visible elements: None; a clean, uncluttered studio backdrop.
* Background-subject relationship: The cool, neutral background provides a stark, elegant contrast that makes the warm, fair skin tones and ivory clothing pop.

7. CAMERA ANGLE & LIGHTING:

* Camera angle: Eye-level, straight-on portrait angle.

prompts.title: * Framing: Half-body portrait, cropped j
prompts.content:
* Framing: Half-body portrait, cropped just below the chest.
* Focal length feel: Portrait lens (around 85mm) with flattering compression and no distortion.
* Lighting type: Studio softbox lighting.
* Light direction: Frontal, slightly angled to the left to create soft, seamless transitions.
* Light quality: Extremely diffused, soft, and shadowless, minimizing harsh lines.
* Shadows & highlights: Very soft, subtle shadows beneath the chin and collarbones to define the model's structure.

8. OVERALL MOOD & ATMOSPHERE:

* Emotional tone: Ethereal, pure, and tranquil.
* Photographic style: High-end beauty editorial and commercial fashion portrait.
* Color grading: Soft, bright, and clean with cool-toned background elements and warm, delicate skin tones.
* Color palette: Ivory, cream, soft pink, rose, and light gray-blue.
* Overall visual impact: A clean, high-fashion aesthetic that emphasizes delicate textures, soft lighting, and serene beauty.

---

[ASPECT RATIO]
Aspect ratio: 2:3

[QUALITY]
8k, highly realistic, professional portrait photography, clean elegant lighting, ultra-detailed skin textures.

prompts.title: 나일론 풍선 캐릭터 조각 사진 프롬프트
prompts.description: 캐릭터를 나일론 풍선처럼 압축·변형해 정방형 프레임에 꽉 채운 조각 사진
prompts.content: A 1:1 square format photograph presented within a uniform, thin solid white border (approx. 3px relative width) framing all four sides of the entire composition. Containing within this white frame is a colossal, overstuffed sculpture of the [image 1], brutally deformed and sadistically crammed into the confining square space. The figure is constructed from clean, high gloss nylon padding big head segments, The obejct is heavy a swollen shape, pressing intensely against the inner edges of the white border, with facial features smushed and limbs awkwardly crushed to fit, emphasizing a painful sense of extreme pressurized distortion. Do not overly crush, smear, or distort the eyes, nose, or mouth. Keep the facial features readable, balanced, and appealing, with the expression still intact. The form is bursting at the seams like an overinflated balloon, completely eliminating any negative space or background within the frame. Soft, dramatic lighting grazes the sleek, premium nylon surfaces, highlighting the deep, exaggerated bulbous folds, immense pillowy textures, and the surreal, overwhelming tension of the trapped character.

prompts.title: 아이스 블록 제품 사진 프롬프트
prompts.description: 제품을 두꺼운 반투명 얼음 블록 안에 가두어 프리미엄 뷰티 캠페인 느낌으로 찍은 사진
prompts.content: ate a product photography image only. Use the uploaded product as the exact product reference. Position the uploaded product accurately and fully inside a thick translucent ice block, preserving its exact logo, packaging shape, proportions, and visible front-facing identity. Adapt the ice block’s overall shape and contours to naturally fit the product’s form and silhouette, so the ice appears custom-frozen around the product while still remaining thick, sculptural, and premium. Use a vertical close-up front view composition. Keep the product and ice block slightly tilted 15 degrees as one unified floating object, with clear top, bottom, left, and right margins, centered in the frame. The logo should remain visible through frosty distortion, trapped air bubbles, and bright frozen texture. Remove all shadows completely. Use a #091E3A to #2F80ED to #2D9EE0 vertical gradient studio background with cold crisp lighting, icy rim highlights, and a clean futuristic beauty campaign finish. Make the image feel cold, fresh, sculptural, and premium. Do not add extra text.
